creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #6)

Hi Fernando,

thanks for reworking the patch. I wasn't aware of the process within Bugzilla regarding port updates. For larger changes I'll use Phabricator like you suggested.

Please commit the update since I didn't have a commit-ready ports tree checked out at the moment.

Thanks and cheers,

--Gordon
